vocabularyNote: These five dimensions are an ApexVoid analytical vocabulary. They are NOT claimed to be traditional canonical Tử Vi terms, and they carry no numeric mapping. Aggregation across dimensions is deferred to a later phase.

capacity.description: Structural qi capacity: how much sustaining force a palace holds and can retain.
observableIndicators: presence or absence of major stars in the palace
canonical brightness of resident major stars
Vô Chính Diệu (empty of major stars) status
nonClaims: not a luck or fortune score
not the Palace Overview capacity/stability axis or any numeric vector

coherence.description: Whether the palace's components coordinate or pull apart / conflict.
observableIndicators: complementary versus conflicting star families co-present
five-element agreement or clash among residents
nonClaims: not derived from any prior module driver or aggregate

expression.description: Whether the palace's qi can manifest outward or is impeded.
observableIndicators: Tuần / Triệt presence over the palace
natal transformations enabling or obstructing expression
nonClaims: not an activation timing or annual trigger
does not import Annual Axes activation scores

regulation.description: Whether disruptive factors can be contained, moderated or transformed.
observableIndicators: transformations that convert or aggravate disruption
nonClaims: not a risk number or pressure score
not the Palace Overview pressure axis

tendency.description: A qualitative orientation label only: nourishing, mixed, pressuring, or not-yet-determined.
observableIndicators: qualitative orientation of the co-present structure
nonClaims: tendency is NOT the old support/pressure axis
must NOT import support/pressure scores, drivers, deltas or vectors
an orientation label, never an aggregated numeric outcome

operationVocabularyNote: Operations are symbolic verbs, never numeric deltas. `restrict` sits between block and release for expression; `classify`/`orient` are tendency-only orientation verbs; `transform` is the cross-cutting transmutation verb (not on tendency). Allowed (dimension, operation) pairs are declared in dimension-operation-compatibility.v0.1.json.
